mapper.select: SELECT a.num, b.amount FROM ( SELECT COUNT(b.id) AS 'num' FROM `a_hot_coop_data` a LEFT JOIN `a_hot_coop` b ON b.id = a.coop_id WHERE a.del_flag = 0 AND b.del_flag = 0 AND YEAR(a.rele_time) = #{date} ) a JOIN ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount),0) AS 'amount' FROM `a_hot_coop_data` a LEFT JOIN `a_hot_coop` b ON b.id = a.coop_id WHERE a.del_flag = 0 AND b.del_flag = 0 AND YEAR(a.rele_time) = #{date} ) b ON 1=1
SELECT b.country, SUM(a.id) AS 'num' FROM `a_hot_coop_data` a LEFT JOIN `a_hot_coop` b ON b.id = a.coop_id WHERE a.del_flag = 0 AND b.del_flag = 0 AND YEAR(a.`rele_time`) = #{date} GROUP BY b.country
